sub_modules.bpf_coeff_rom: Combinational ROM that maps each tap index to the required hard-coded 101-tap signed FIR coefficient.
sub_modules.bpf_tap_multiply: Combinational signed multiplier for one delayed sample and one signed coefficient.
sub_modules.bpf_accumulate: Combinational 64-bit accumulator that sums all tap products from the flattened product bus.
sub_modules.bpf_scale_output: Combinational fixed-point output scaler that arithmetic right-shifts the 64-bit accumulation and truncates to the output width.
